scripts.build: docker compose exec web yarn workspaces foreach --all run build
scripts.build:ui: docker compose exec web yarn workspace @babyclothes/ui build
scripts.build:web: docker compose exec web yarn workspace @babyclothes/web build
scripts.preview: docker compose exec web yarn workspace @babyclothes/web preview
scripts.test: docker compose exec web yarn workspaces foreach --all run test
scripts.test:web: docker compose exec web yarn workspace @babyclothes/web test
scripts.test:ui: docker compose exec web yarn workspace @babyclothes/ui test
scripts.test:agents: docker compose exec agents yarn workspace @babyclothes/agents test
scripts.test:api: docker compose exec api mix test
scripts.check: docker compose exec web yarn workspaces foreach --all run check
scripts.check:web: docker compose exec web yarn workspace @babyclothes/web check
scripts.check:ui: docker compose exec web yarn workspace @babyclothes/ui check
scripts.api:migrate: docker compose exec api mix ecto.migrate
scripts.api:credo: docker compose exec api mix credo
